event: Children celebrating Corpus Christi morning with flower wreaths
symbols: flower wreaths on children — innocence adorned for a sacred feast
white dresses — purity and the festive garments of worship
sunlit courtyard — the light of faith illuminating communal celebration
description: A sunlit courtyard scene before old stone buildings with an arched doorway. A group of children, many girls in white dresses wearing flower wreaths on their heads, gather at center. Some carry baskets of flowers. Boys in varied clothing surround them. An elderly man sits on a bench at the far left, watching. The children interact joyfully — some reaching toward each other, some holding flowers, one boy at right striding confidently. Lush green vines and trees grow against the stone walls. Bright morning sunlight illuminates the scene from the left, casting warm shadows.
